summary: Queue throttling, retry, cancellation, resume, and product evidence writers are implemented, stored image artifact evidence now rejects scratch/template-like project paths, restart-resume proof rejects resumed/completed-before artifact overlap, and local project folder export now includes project-scoped browser artifact writes. No packaged Codex OAuth image run has captured genuine retry, cancellation, and restart-resume evidence.

currentEvidence.kind: product queue evidence writer with stored image artifact path validation
stored image artifact path false-ready regression tests
restart-resume evidence validator with duplicate and overlap artifact id blocking
project folder export includes project-scoped browser artifact writes
project artifact write export, filtering, and redaction regression
project folder download wires current browser artifact writes into export

missingEvidence: packaged Codex OAuth image run with genuine 429 or 5xx retry provenance
in-flight user cancellation evidence from a real provider job
restart-resume evidence proving completed slides are not regenerated
stored versioned PNG artifact paths for every completed queue slide
